plugins.name: code-history
plugins.description: Trace git history of specific code — find when functions, patterns, or files were added, modified, or removed, and explain the intent behind each change.

plugins.name: django-ticket-triage
plugins.description: Analyze a Django Trac ticket and produce a triage recommendation report.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Code documentation agent — write/update docs with /docs write, check status with /docs check. Minimal code blocks, reference pointer based.

plugins.name: github-review-check-duplicate
plugins.description: Check if a GitHub issue is a duplicate and find related issues and PRs.

plugins.name: github-review-issue
plugins.description: Analyze a GitHub issue and provide a structured summary with next-action assessment.

plugins.name: github-review-pr
plugins.description: Analyze a GitHub pull request and produce a review report covering changes, review status, and code quality.

plugins.name: html-visual
plugins.description: Generate an interactive single-file HTML visualization (mockup, wireframe, ERD, flowchart, chart, slides, architecture diagram, dashboard, timeline, mindmap, kanban, table).

plugins.name: obsidian-research
plugins.description: Obsidian fleeting note를 구조화된 리서치를 통해 permanent note로 발전시키는 제텔카스텐 워크플로우. init/gather/publish 서브커맨드로 단계별 리서치 수행.

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Notion 페이지에서 키워드를 추출하고 Slack, GitHub에서 관련 자료를 검색하여 페이지 하단에 참조 링크를 기록합니다.

plugins.name: ralph-loop-template
plugins.description: Generates iterable checklist PROMPT files for Ralph Loop from plan files or current context, and provides the /ralph-loop execution command.

plugins.name: write-pr
plugins.description: Analyzes git diff and commit history to write PR title and description based on the project's PR template.
